pi_items.source: Verified in setup_task.sh (line 16), export_result.sh (line 11), and verifier.py (line 29). All scripts consistently use this token name.
Verified in setup_task.sh (line 27: rm -f) and export_result.sh (line 10: TOKEN_FILE=). File path is consistent across all scripts.
Verified in setup_task.sh (line 19: find_user_by_email call), setup_freescout.sh (lines 78, 207: hardcoded admin credentials). Email is used consistently for admin user initialization.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires generating an API token named 'MetricsDash' for the admin user (admin@helpdesk.local) and saving it to /home/ga/metrics_token.txt. This is a synthetic test environment: setup_freescout.sh creates a local Docker-based FreeScout helpdesk system with hardcoded admin credentials and isolated test data. The token and file path are test artifacts created within the containerized environment, not from a real FreeScout deployment.
